value.content:
DUMMY SCHEDULE TEST, REMOVE BEFORE PUBLISH

Feature bloat is not a strategy.

For most agencies, the better product is the one that gets set up quickly, stays understandable, and does not need constant babysitting.

Simple beats impressive when the job is monthly delivery, client trust, and team sanity.

Reporting software should lower admin load, not create more of it.

DUMMY SCHEDULE TEST, REMOVE BEFORE PUBLISH

Simple setup and low admin beat feature bloat more often than SaaS companies like to admit.

Agencies need reporting tools they can trust without constant babysitting.

DUMMY SCHEDULE TEST, REMOVE BEFORE PUBLISH

Feature bloat is not a moat. For agencies, simple setup and low admin usually win.

DUMMY SCHEDULE TEST, REMOVE BEFORE PUBLISH

This placeholder YouTube upload supports a weekly dummy content run for Oviond.

Core idea: simple setup and low admin beat feature bloat when agencies need reporting that actually gets delivered.

settings.title: DUMMY TEST - Feature Bloat Is Not a Moat
